transit.title: Transit
transit.rideshare_desc: Find or offer shared rides at transit stops
transit.landing_meta: Track buses, metros and trams in real time — schedules, live GPS and journey planning. Free and open-source.
transit.landing_hero_title: Real-time public transit — free and open-source
transit.landing_hero_subtitle: See where your bus is right now. Schedules, live GPS positions and routes across Lisbon, Porto, Helsinki, Prague and more.
transit.landing_problem_1: Fragmented transit apps — one per city, per operator
transit.landing_problem_3: Journey planners that don't work outside major capitals
transit.landing_feature_1_desc: Live positions of thousands of vehicles on the map — buses, metros, trams, ferries
transit.landing_feature_2_desc: Lisbon, Porto, Helsinki, Prague, Boston, Philadelphia, Seattle, New York — all on one platform
transit.landing_feature_3_desc: Look up schedules by stop or route, with real-time ETAs when available
transit.landing_feature_4_desc: Works directly in the browser — no downloads, no sign-ups, instant access
transit.landing_feature_5_desc: Powered by open GTFS feeds and the community — anyone can propose new cities
transit.landing_feature_6_desc: Open-source, no ads, no tracking. Civic infrastructure, not a product
transit.landing_how_1: Open the transit page and find your city
transit.landing_how_2: Search for stops or routes — or use GPS to find the nearest ones
transit.landing_how_3: See live vehicles on the map and check departure times
transit.landing_free_desc: Public transit information is a right, not a privilege. Parahub doesn't charge, doesn't track, doesn't sell data.

driver.title: Driver Mode
driver.wot_required: Verified by 3+ community members required to use Driver Mode
driver.gps_error: GPS signal lost — check location permissions
driver.description: Share your real-time GPS position on a transit route. Passengers will see your vehicle on the map — no special hardware needed, just your phone.
driver.nav_desc: Broadcast your location as a transit vehicle
